scripts.check:python: conda run -n anban ruff format --check . && conda run -n anban ruff check . && conda run -n anban python scripts/run_pyright.py && conda run -n anban pytest
scripts.acceptance:security: conda run -n anban pytest tests/core/test_metadata.py tests/model/test_adapter.py tests/capability tests/runtime/test_general_agent.py tests/runtime/test_persistent_runtime.py tests/runtime/test_observability.py tests/test_cli.py && conda run -n anban python tests/acceptance/cli_security_probe.py
scripts.acceptance:v0.1: pnpm check && pnpm build && pnpm run doctor && pnpm run acceptance:persistence && pnpm run acceptance:model && pnpm run acceptance:skill && pnpm run acceptance:capability && pnpm run acceptance:p2 && pnpm run acceptance:e2e && pnpm run acceptance:security && conda run -n anban python -m scripts.acceptance.check_release_closure
